title: bridge-jmap: malformed email retried forever
description: email_get deserializes emails one by one; on serde failure it logs a warning and skips the email (bridge.rs:351-357) but never inserts its ID into seen_ids. On every subsequent poll the same malformed email reappears in new_ids, is fetched again, fails deserialization again, and logs again — indefinitely. Trigger: any JMAP email whose RFC 8621 representation is malformed or has missing required fields. Bad behavior: perpetual warn-log spam per poll interval; the email never drains from the JMAP mailbox.
